title: Learning Spark: Lightning-Fast Big Data Analysis
author: Mark Hamstra, Matei Zaharia, Holden Karau, Andy Konwinski, Patrick Wendell
description: This book introduces Apache Spark, the open source cluster computing system that makes data analytics fast to write and fast to run. You'll learn how to express parallel jobs with just a few lines of code, and cover applications from simple batch jobs to stream processing and machine learning.
